ecrans_subtitle: The complete range of Hallucine inflatable screens
ecran_geant_desc: Our classic blower screen, continuously inflated by a silent fan. The lightest in the world.
ecran_etanche_subtitle: TPU Technology — Inflates once, stays inflated
ecran_etanche_desc: Patented TPU technology. Inflates once and stays inflated without a fan. Silent, ideal for hotels and swimming pools.
ecran_economique_subtitle: The budget solution without compromising on quality
ecran_economique_desc: Budget version with 4:3 screen fabric. Ideal for small budgets and associations.
tentes_subtitle: The complete range of inflatable event tents
tente_x_desc: X-shaped, 4 to 6 meters, ideal for events and receptions.
tente_n_desc: Classic shape, 3 to 8 meters, versatile and robust.
tente_v_desc: Modern V-shape, 4 to 6 meters, contemporary design.
tente_araignee_desc: Spider shape, 3 to 5 meters, compact and lightweight.
arches_subtitle: Inflatable arches for all your events
arches_desc: Customizable inflatable arches for sports, promotional, and cultural events.
mobilier_desc: Inflatable armchairs, sofas, poufs, and tables for your event lounge areas.
accessoires_subtitle: Everything you need for your outdoor cinema
accessoires_desc: Video projectors, sound systems, replacement screens, and all accessories for your outdoor cinema.
comparaison_subtitle: Find the perfect screen for your use
led_desc: Our high-resolution LED screens for day and night events.
